archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Deep Blue Premium SaaS

layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-screen bg-brand-primary text-slate-200 border-r border-brand-primary
layout.header: h-16 sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center px-4 md:px-8

components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200
components.button_primary: bg-[#0A2540] text-white hover:bg-[#103154] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB] focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
components.input: w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB] outline-none transition-shadow bg-white
components.badge_base: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

interactions.hover_state: All interactive elements must change background or border color on hover, plus cursor-pointer.
interactions.focus_state: Inputs and buttons must use high-contrast focus rings (e.g., focus:ring-[#2563EB]).
interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' on cards and buttons.

login_background.description: Abstract deep blue gradient background used for the right half of the split-screen auth pages (Login/Register).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Button texts must be pure white over #0A2540.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard SaaS layout: Sidebar (Left, Fixed, deep blue #0A2540) + Main Content (Right).
Mobile Responsive: Sidebar should collapse into a Hamburger menu on mobile.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components (Tables, Dialogs, Dropdowns, Inputs, Badges).
Apply 'Outfit' font to all Headings, and 'Inter' to body text. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css or tailwind.config.
Use the 'badge_base' and status colors to dynamically render New/Paid/Shipped states.
Ensure all data tables have empty states clearly designed with an icon and soft text.
Use `react-router-dom` for navigation between Dashboard, Customers, Orders, Reminders.
Implement split-screen login page using `media.login_background.url` for the visual half.
Ensure total counts on the Dashboard stretch properly and use 'number' typography rule.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Do NOT use default blue for the sidebar, strictly use `#0A2540`.
